title: Remove "fx" label in Kanban view
excerpt: In a Kanban view, formula fields appear with an “fx” on the card. Is there a way to just display the value without the “fx”? Thanks for your help!

posts.author: Chad (Chad Young)
posts.cookedHtml: In a Kanban view, formula fields appear with an “fx” on the card. Is there a way to just display the value without the “fx”? Thanks for your help!
